title: CTW - Complementary Tools & Weapons
description: This mod adds various new weapons and tools that complement the vanilla ones.
body:
Complementary Tools & Weapons (CTW) is a mod that adds various weapons and tools to the game, complementing the vanilla ones. This weapons are in all the vanilla tiers, except wood, and have a balance amount of speed, damage, and a balance crafting recipe.

 

The mod for now is in Beta, and there will be more weapons and mechanics in the future.

For now, the mod introduces 4 new weapon types and 1 new tool type:

- Longswords: This is a sword that is crafted with one sword of the tier that you want the longsword, and 2 materials of the tier above the sword. It´s like the crafting recipe of a normal sword, but instead of using a stick, you need a sword of the material that you are gonna craft the sword. The Diamond Longsword for example does 8 of damage has 1.4 of speed. In comparison, the Diamond Sword does a damage of 7 and has a speed of 1.6.
 

- Greatswords: This is a sword crafted with the same recipe that the longsword, but instead of using a sword of the material that you're gonna crafted the weapon, you use a longsword. The Diamond Greatsword for example has a damage of 10 and a speed of 1.1.
 

- Battleaxes: This is an axe that is crafted with two sticks and 5 of the material that you're gonna craft the weapon. The Diamond Battleaxe for example does a damage of 12 and has a speed of 0.7.
 

- Hammers: This is like a normal pickaxe, but instead of mining 1x1, mines a 3x3 area. Is crafted with 3 sticks and 4 of the material that you're gonna craft the weapon.
 

- Halberds: This is a weapon crafted with 3 sticks and 2 of the material that you're gonna craft the weapon. The Diamond Halberd for example does a damage of 9 and has a speed of 1.2.
 

The mod isn`t compatible with other mods, so you'll not find this weapons made with materials of other mods, only the vanilla ones, that include stone, iron, gold, diamond and netherite.
